summary: Comprehensive testing of BRANE Marketplace completed. Backend APIs 100% functional (14/14 tests passed). Frontend 85% functional with excellent dark theme implementation, admin panel with all 8 tabs working, profile system with avatar upload, and proper BRANE branding. Minor issue with registration form field mapping.

ui_bugs.issue: Form field mapping incorrect - name input appears to map to search field instead of proper name field
Sessions expire quickly requiring frequent re-login during testing

passed_tests: Home page loads with dark theme and 3D animated background
BRANE hero section with gold accents
Lojas/Venda Rapida tabs functional
Admin login successful (admin@brane.com / Admin123!)
Admin panel loads with all 8 tabs working
Dashboard shows correct stats (4 users, 2 products, 2 orders, R$ 399.96 sales)
Profile avatar shows user initials in gold circle
Profile page with avatar upload functionality
Profile tabs (Personal, Bank, Security) all working
Bank details form complete with all fields
Products page with search and category filtering
Product detail navigation and add to cart button
Footer has BRANE branding only, no 'Made with Emergent'
BRANE watermark present
All 14 backend API endpoints working (100% success rate)
Role switching functionality working
Product CRUD operations working
Cart and order creation working
Wallet API endpoints working
Categories endpoint with all 9 categories
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix registration form field mapping issue where name input is incorrectly mapped to search field. All other functionality is working correctly.
